cycle_reasoning: The product has most core features built and is now in a polishing and security hardening phase. The CTO has a large backlog (11 issues), including critical P0 security and infrastructure tasks (password hashing, Stripe webhooks, RLS), so I will not create any new CTO issues. I am assigning maximum turns to the CTO to clear these critical blockers. QA is assigned to verify the ongoing migrations and fixes. Product and Finance are assigned to complete their remaining audit and budget tasks respectively.
